title: GAP India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: GAP India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with GAP India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About GAP India:
GAP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
